name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, method, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ShadowGodd1
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What stage of the DS lifecycle does it affect?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like. Include a proposed API if possible:

```python
from ds_toolkit.<stage> import MyNewModule

result = MyNewModule(param=value).run(df)
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Stage

Which toolkit stage does this belong to?

- [ ] Stage 1 — Data Understanding & Validation
- [ ] Stage 2 — Data Cleaning & Preprocessing
- [ ] Stage 3 — Feature Engineering
- [ ] Stage 4 — Model Training & Selection
- [ ] Stage 5 — Evaluation & Diagnostics
- [ ] Stage 6 — Experiment Tracking & Reproducibility
- [ ] Stage 7 — Reporting & Notebook Output
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling

## Additional context

Any examples, papers, or references that support this feature.
